---
title: "Energy-System Efficiency Optimization"
domain: "power"
period: "2024-Present"
role: "Project Lead"
problem: "Improve operating efficiency under changing input quality and load swings while respecting process and equipment limits."
method: "Constraint-aware optimization with adaptive feasible regions, data-assisted online recommendation, and staged validation workflow."
outcome: "Efficiency improved across multiple operating scenarios with sustained long-run operation."
status: "deployed"
confidentiality: "public-safe"
selected: true
toc: false
---

::: {.project-safe-note}
Public-safe evidence only: no acceptance pages with signatures, contract numbers, or handwritten records are displayed.
:::

## Operational Context

This deployment targets large-scale energy-conversion units under rapid load variation and changing operating conditions. The core requirement is to improve efficiency while respecting process boundaries.

- Typical deployment context: 330 MW / 660 MW unit environments.
- Primary objective: improve operating efficiency while maintaining stable operation.
- Constraints: process limits, equipment boundaries, and actuator operating ranges.

## Method Architecture

<div class="project-figure-card">
<img src="/assets/images/projects/power/thermal_process_overview.png" alt="Energy-system efficiency-loop main interface">
<p>End-to-end efficiency-loop view integrating process state, key constraints, and actuator-side adjustments.</p>
<p class="project-figure-caption-cn">中文图注：能效闭环总览界面，联动工况输入、锅炉状态与执行机构参数。</p>
</div>

- Robust constrained optimization for setpoint recommendation.
- Condition-adaptive feasible-set tightening for robust operation under uncertainty.
- Data-assisted recommendation modules to reduce online latency.
- Staged release workflow with replay validation.

## Interface Evidence

::: {.project-figure-grid-3}
<div class="project-figure-card">
<img src="/assets/images/projects/power/thermal_consumption_gap_analysis.png" alt="Boiler efficiency loop coal-consumption gap analysis panel">
<p>Real-time coal-consumption gap analysis for identifying controllable contributors.</p>
<p class="project-figure-caption-cn">中文图注：锅炉能效闭环煤耗差分析界面，用于实时定位关键偏差项。</p>
</div>

<div class="project-figure-card">
<img src="/assets/images/projects/power/thermal_sootblowing_strategy.png" alt="Operating-strategy matrix interface">
<p>Operating-strategy panel with nozzle-level state and scheduling logic.</p>
<p class="project-figure-caption-cn">中文图注：智能吹灰投切策略界面，展示吹灰器状态与策略执行。</p>
</div>

<div class="project-figure-card">
<img src="/assets/images/projects/power/thermal_wall_temp_analysis.png" alt="Wall-temperature analysis panel in sootblowing module">
<p>Wall-temperature analysis dashboard used for thermal-state monitoring during operation.</p>
<p class="project-figure-caption-cn">中文图注：壁温分析界面，用于受热面状态监测与吹灰策略辅助决策。</p>
</div>
:::

## Measured Impact

<div class="project-figure-card">
<img src="/assets/images/projects/power/thermal_result_table.png" alt="Result table comparing coal-consumption before and after deployment under multiple load conditions">
<p>Before-vs-after result table across representative load scenarios.</p>
<p class="project-figure-caption-cn">中文图注：多负荷工况下的投运前后结果对比表（示例）。</p>
</div>

::: {.project-evidence-table}
| Scenario | Representative load | Reported coal-consumption change | Unit |
|---|---:|---:|---:|
| Continuous-operation example | ~50% load (~330 MW) | -1.2 | g/kWh |
| Additional low-load cases | 20% / 40% load | -3 to -6 | g/kWh |
:::

- Measurable reduction in fuel-specific consumption under constrained operation.
- Better diagnosis support for operators through gap-analysis and trend interfaces.
- Stable deployment behavior under multi-condition operation.

## Deployment Notes

- Cross-site template reuse supported faster rollout in similar units.
- Strategy release followed staged validation and review safeguards.
- Reported values are scenario-based; exact gains vary by unit condition and dispatch profile.
